name: conversation
description: Threaded messaging with a human across agent conversation threads. Supports status updates (fire-and-forget) and questions (with reply mechanism). When the human replies to a question, the provider routes the response back to the agent. Outbound messages from agents MUST be prefixed with a bracketed identifier (e.g., [TaskPilot]) to prevent feedback loops with SMS watchers.

behavior.input: A message string, message_type (status|question|alert), task_id for thread routing, and reply_port for routing replies back to the agent's channel
behavior.output: Confirmation of delivery with channel details. For question type, a reply mechanism is presented to the human. When the human replies, the provider POSTs the reply to http://{desktop_ip}:{reply_port}
behavior.deterministic: Delivery must succeed or return explicit failure. Reply routing is best-effort.

urgency.description: Urgency level — provider maps to appropriate notification priority

channel_preference.description: Preferred channel (e.g., 'sms', 'slack', 'channel') — hint only, provider decides

source.description: Name of the plugin or system that generated the message
